instructions.name: buy_resale
docs: Buy tokens from a resale listing. amount is how many to buy (partial fills).

accounts.name: resale_escrow
docs: Resale escrow holding option tokens (Token-2022 PDA).

accounts.name: buyer_option_account
docs: Buyer's option token account (Token-2022). Frontend creates ATA before calling.

accounts.name: option_mint
docs: Option token mint (Token-2022 mint).

accounts.name: token_program
docs: Standard SPL Token program — for USDC transfers.

accounts.name: token_2022_program
docs: Token-2022 program — for option token transfers.

accounts.name: transfer_hook_program
docs: Transfer hook program.

accounts.name: extra_account_meta_list
docs: ExtraAccountMetaList for the transfer hook.

accounts.name: hook_state
docs: HookState with expiry info for the transfer hook.

instructions.name: cancel_option
docs: Cancel an unsold option. Burns all tokens, returns collateral.

accounts.name: escrow
docs: USDC collateral escrow (standard Token).

accounts.name: purchase_escrow
docs: Purchase escrow holding option tokens (Token-2022).

accounts.name: option_mint
docs: Option token mint (Token-2022).

accounts.name: token_program
docs: Standard SPL Token — for USDC operations.

accounts.name: token_2022_program
docs: Token-2022 — for burning option tokens.

instructions.name: cancel_resale
docs: Cancel a resale listing. Returns tokens to seller.

accounts.name: resale_escrow
docs: Resale escrow holding option tokens (Token-2022 PDA).

accounts.name: seller_option_account
docs: Seller's option token account (Token-2022, receives tokens back).

accounts.name: option_mint
docs: Option token mint (Token-2022 mint).

accounts.name: token_2022_program
docs: Token-2022 program — for option token transfers.

accounts.name: transfer_hook_program
docs: Transfer hook program.

accounts.name: extra_account_meta_list
docs: ExtraAccountMetaList for the transfer hook.

accounts.name: hook_state
docs: HookState with expiry info for the transfer hook.

accounts.name: creator
docs: The user creating this market. Anyone can create a market — there's no
permissioning. They pay the rent for the new account.

accounts.name: protocol_state
docs: The global ProtocolState — we need this to increment total_markets.

accounts.name: market
docs: The new OptionsMarket PDA.
Seeds use the asset name as bytes (not an enum discriminant), making
the protocol open to ANY asset. For example:
- "SOL" + strike + expiry + Call  → one unique PDA
- "AAPL" + strike + expiry + Call → a different PDA
- "EUR/USD" + strike + expiry + Put → yet another
Attempting to create a duplicate combination will fail.

accounts.name: system_program
docs: Required for creating new accounts.

instructions.name: exercise_option
docs: Exercise option tokens after settlement. Burns tokens, distributes PnL.

accounts.name: option_mint
docs: Option token mint (Token-2022).

accounts.name: exerciser_option_account
docs: Exerciser's option token account (Token-2022).

accounts.name: exerciser_usdc_account
docs: Exerciser's USDC account (receives PnL).

accounts.name: writer_usdc_account
docs: Writer's USDC account (receives remaining collateral).

accounts.name: token_program
docs: Standard SPL Token — for USDC operations.

accounts.name: token_2022_program
docs: Token-2022 — for burning option tokens.

instructions.name: expire_option
docs: Expire an unexercised option. Returns collateral to writer.

accounts.name: admin
docs: The admin who is initializing the protocol. They pay for account rent
and become the protocol admin.

accounts.name: protocol_state
docs: ProtocolState PDA — the global config singleton.
`init` means Anchor will create this account. If it already exists,
the transaction fails (preventing double-initialization).

accounts.name: treasury
docs: Treasury — a USDC token account owned by the protocol PDA.
This is where protocol fees accumulate.

accounts.name: usdc_mint
docs: The USDC mint account. On devnet, this is a test mint.

accounts.name: system_program
docs: Required system programs for account creation.

instructions.name: list_for_resale
docs: List option tokens for resale. token_amount is how many to list.

accounts.name: seller_option_account
docs: Seller's option token account (Token-2022).

accounts.name: resale_escrow
docs: Resale escrow for holding listed option tokens (Token-2022 PDA).
Created in handler if it doesn't exist yet.

accounts.name: option_mint
docs: Option token mint (Token-2022 mint).

accounts.name: token_2022_program
docs: Token-2022 program — for option token transfers.

accounts.name: transfer_hook_program
docs: Transfer hook program.

accounts.name: extra_account_meta_list
docs: ExtraAccountMetaList for the transfer hook.

accounts.name: hook_state
docs: HookState with expiry info for the transfer hook.

instructions.name: purchase_option
docs: Purchase option tokens. Amount is how many tokens to buy (partial fills supported).

accounts.name: purchase_escrow
docs: Purchase escrow holding option tokens (Token-2022 account).

accounts.name: buyer_option_account
docs: Buyer's option token account (Token-2022). Frontend creates ATA before calling.

accounts.name: option_mint
docs: Option token mint (Token-2022 mint).

accounts.name: token_program
docs: Standard SPL Token program — for USDC transfers.

accounts.name: token_2022_program
docs: Token-2022 program — for option token transfers.

accounts.name: transfer_hook_program
docs: Transfer hook program.

accounts.name: extra_account_meta_list
docs: ExtraAccountMetaList for the transfer hook.

accounts.name: hook_state
docs: HookState with expiry info for the transfer hook.

instructions.name: settle_market
docs: Settle an expired market with a price (admin-only for hackathon).

accounts.name: admin
docs: Only the protocol admin can settle markets (hackathon constraint).
In production, this would be permissionless with Pyth validation.

accounts.name: protocol_state
docs: Protocol state — used to verify admin identity.

accounts.name: market
docs: The market to settle. Must be a valid OptionsMarket account.

instructions.name: write_option
docs: Write an option: lock collateral, mint option tokens to writer.

accounts.name: escrow
docs: USDC escrow for collateral. Authority = protocol PDA.
This stays on the standard SPL Token program (USDC is not Token-2022).

accounts.name: option_mint
docs: Option token mint — Token-2022 with TransferHook + PermanentDelegate +
MetadataPointer extensions. Created manually via CPI in the handler
because Anchor's `init` doesn't support Token-2022 extensions.
the address matches the expected PDA.

accounts.name: purchase_escrow
docs: Purchase escrow — holds option tokens for buyers. Token-2022 token
account created manually in the handler (same reason as mint).
the address matches the expected PDA.

accounts.name: writer_usdc_account
docs: Writer's USDC account (source of collateral).

accounts.name: transfer_hook_program
docs: The transfer hook program. Validated against the known program ID.

accounts.name: extra_account_meta_list
docs: ExtraAccountMetaList PDA — created by the hook program during CPI.
Seeds: ["extra-account-metas", mint] on the hook program.

accounts.name: hook_state
docs: HookState PDA — stores expiry + protocol PDA for the transfer hook.
Seeds: ["hook-state", mint] on the hook program.

accounts.name: token_program
docs: Standard SPL Token program — used for USDC operations only.

accounts.name: token_2022_program
docs: Token-2022 program — used for the option mint and token accounts.

errors.name: AlreadyInitialized
errors.msg: Protocol has already been initialized

errors.name: Unauthorized
errors.msg: Unauthorized: signer is not the protocol admin

errors.name: ExpiryInPast
errors.msg: Expiry timestamp must be in the future

errors.name: InvalidStrikePrice
errors.msg: Strike price must be greater than zero

errors.name: InvalidPythFeed
errors.msg: Invalid Pyth price feed address

errors.name: InvalidAssetName
errors.msg: Asset name must be 1-16 characters

errors.name: MarketNotExpired
errors.msg: Market has not expired yet

errors.name: MarketAlreadySettled
errors.msg: Market has already been settled

errors.name: MarketNotSettled
errors.msg: Market has not been settled yet

errors.name: MarketExpired
errors.msg: Market has already expired

errors.name: InvalidSettlementPrice
errors.msg: Settlement price must be greater than zero

errors.name: PositionNotActive
errors.msg: Position is no longer active

errors.name: InsufficientCollateral
errors.msg: Insufficient collateral for this option

errors.name: InvalidContractSize
errors.msg: Contract size must be greater than zero

errors.name: InvalidPremium
errors.msg: Premium must be greater than zero

errors.name: NotWriter
errors.msg: Only the writer can perform this action

errors.name: NotTokenHolder
errors.msg: Only the token holder can perform this action

errors.name: CannotBuyOwnOption
errors.msg: Cannot buy your own option

errors.name: InsufficientOptionTokens
errors.msg: Insufficient option tokens to exercise

errors.name: TokensAlreadySold
errors.msg: Writer must hold all tokens to cancel (some were sold)

errors.name: NotListedForResale
errors.msg: Option is not listed for resale

errors.name: AlreadyListedForResale
errors.msg: Option is already listed for resale

errors.name: NotResaleSeller
errors.msg: Only the resale seller can cancel the listing

errors.name: CannotBuyOwnResale
errors.msg: Cannot buy your own resale listing

errors.name: InvalidAssetClass
errors.msg: Asset class must be 0-4 (crypto, commodity, equity, forex, etf)

errors.name: MathOverflow
errors.msg: Arithmetic overflow

fields.name: market
docs: The OptionsMarket this position belongs to.

fields.name: writer
docs: The writer (seller) who locked collateral to create this position.

fields.name: option_mint
docs: The SPL token mint representing ownership of this option.

fields.name: total_supply
docs: Total supply of option tokens minted.

fields.name: tokens_sold
docs: Number of tokens that have been purchased from the primary sale.
Position stays active for more purchases until tokens_sold == total_supply.

fields.name: collateral_amount
docs: Amount of USDC collateral locked by the writer, scaled by 10^6.

fields.name: premium
docs: Total premium price for ALL tokens (scaled by 10^6 USDC).
Per-token premium = premium / total_supply.

fields.name: contract_size
docs: Number of option contracts, scaled by 10^6.

fields.name: created_at
docs: Unix timestamp when this position was created (also PDA seed).

fields.name: is_exercised
docs: Whether ALL tokens have been exercised (escrow fully drained).

fields.name: is_expired
docs: Whether the option has expired without being exercised.

fields.name: is_cancelled
docs: Whether the writer cancelled this position.

fields.name: is_listed_for_resale
docs: Whether this option has tokens listed for resale.

fields.name: resale_premium
docs: The resale asking price for ALL listed tokens (scaled by 10^6 USDC).
Per-token resale price = resale_premium / resale_token_amount.

fields.name: resale_token_amount
docs: How many tokens are currently listed for resale.

fields.name: resale_seller
docs: The seller who listed this for resale.

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump seed.

types.name: OptionType
docs: Whether this option is a call (right to buy) or put (right to sell).

fields.name: asset_name
docs: Human-readable asset identifier (e.g. "SOL", "BTC", "AAPL", "EUR/USD").
This is a flexible string — the protocol supports ANY asset that has
a Pyth oracle feed. Max 16 characters.

fields.name: strike_price
docs: The strike price in USDC, scaled by 10^6.
Example: $200.00 is stored as 200_000_000.

fields.name: expiry_timestamp
docs: Unix timestamp when this option expires. After this time, the option
can be settled using the Pyth oracle price.

fields.name: option_type
docs: Call or Put.

fields.name: is_settled
docs: Whether this market has been settled (the Pyth price at expiry has
been recorded). Once settled, no new positions can be written.

fields.name: settlement_price
docs: The Pyth oracle price recorded at settlement time, scaled by 10^6.
Zero until the market is settled.

fields.name: pyth_feed
docs: The Pyth Network price feed account for this asset.
Used during settlement to read the current price.

fields.name: asset_class
docs: Asset class for categorizing the underlying asset.
0 = crypto, 1 = commodity, 2 = equity, 3 = forex, 4 = ETF.

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump seed.

fields.name: admin
docs: The admin wallet that can update protocol settings.
Set to the signer of the `initialize_protocol` transaction.

fields.name: fee_bps
docs: Fee charged on option purchases, in basis points (1 bps = 0.01%).
Default: 50 bps = 0.50%.
Example: on a 100 USDC premium, the fee is 0.50 USDC.

fields.name: treasury
docs: The treasury token account (PDA) that collects protocol fees in USDC.

fields.name: usdc_mint
docs: The USDC mint address. Stored so all instructions can validate that
token accounts are denominated in USDC.

fields.name: total_markets
docs: Running count of all markets created. Used for stats/tracking.

fields.name: total_volume
docs: Running total of all USDC volume (premiums + settlements) flowing
through the protocol. Scaled by 10^6 (USDC decimals).

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump seed, stored so we don't have to recalculate it.
